# Third-Party Dependencies

This directory (`third_party/`) contains third-party libraries bundled with Endee.

It is part of the upstream [endee-io/endee](https://github.com/endee-io/endee) repository.

## Bundled Libraries

These components are included as source or header-only libraries and compiled with the project:

| Library | Purpose | License |
|---------|---------|---------|
| [MDBX](https://libmdbx.dqdkfa.ru/) | Embedded key-value store for persistent storage | Apache 2.0 / OpenLDAP |
| [nlohmann/json](https://github.com/nlohmann/json) | JSON parsing and serialization | MIT |
| [cpp-httplib](https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib) | Embedded HTTP server | MIT |
| [hnswlib](https://github.com/nmslib/hnswlib) | HNSW approximate nearest-neighbor index | Apache 2.0 |

Use of these components is governed by their own respective license terms.
